report.summary: Audited 3 recent pages (stablecoin yield tracker, crypto TA guide, token security scanner), created 4 missing OG images, and implemented 7 UX fixes including accessibility improvements, mobile-friendly table scrolling, and touch target compliance.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added BackToTop component to /tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker — was missing entirely
Increased filter chip touch targets from 6px/14px padding to 8px/16px with minHeight:44px on stablecoin yield tracker — now meets WCAG 44px minimum
Increased sort button touch targets from 6px/12px padding to 8px/14px with minHeight:44px on stablecoin yield tracker
Added aria-label to search input on stablecoin yield tracker for screen reader accessibility
Added aria-label to sort buttons and KYC checkbox for screen reader accessibility
Added min-width (700px) to chart patterns table in TA guide for proper horizontal scroll on mobile instead of column compression
Added min-width (560px) to timeframes table in TA guide for mobile scroll behavior
Added WebkitOverflowScrolling: touch to both TA guide tables for smooth iOS momentum scrolling
Increased KYC checkbox size from 18px to 20px and label font from 12px to 13px for better legibility

TokenSecurityScanner confirmed well-built: proper input validation (EVM + Solana format), mobile-responsive grid (640px breakpoint), prefers-reduced-motion support, aria-labels on interactive elements, dropdown outside-click handling

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-technical-analysis-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with candlestick chart visualization, RSI indicator, moving average line, category badges (Trading, Technical Analysis, Intermediate), stats (77% RSI+MACD win rate, 6 indicators, 8+ patterns)

OG image: telegram-mini-apps-ton-gaming-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with mini app grid layout, game/reward icons, category badges (Telegram/TON, Gaming, Mini Apps), stats (950M+ users, 100M+ MAU, $5B+ TVL)

OG image: tariffs-trade-war-crypto-impact-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with volatile price chart showing tariff/retaliation event markers, category badges (Macro, Trade War, Policy), stats (-15% BTC on tariff day, $2T+ market cap, DeFi hedges)

OG image: onchain-forex-stablecoin-diversity-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with currency flow diagram (USD/EUR/GBP/JPY/SGD nodes connected to central On-Chain FX hub), category badges (Stablecoins, Forex, DeFi), stats ($180B+ supply, 15+ currencies, 24/7 FX)

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker — 6 fixes applied (BackToTop, filter chip touch targets, sort button touch targets, search aria-label, sort aria-labels, KYC checkbox sizing)
/learn/crypto-technical-analysis-guide-2026 — 2 fixes applied (table min-widths for mobile, iOS touch scrolling). Content structure confirmed solid with TOC, FAQ, structured data, and BackToTop
/tools/token-security-scanner — No issues found (mobile responsive, input validation, aria-labels, prefers-reduced-motion support all present)

sections.title: Recommendations for Future Sprints
items: Stablecoin yield tracker page is a 'use client' component that exports no Next.js metadata — should be refactored to server/client split for proper SEO meta tags
TA guide page is also 'use client' without metadata export — same refactor recommended
Add scroll-margin-top to section anchors across learn articles for sticky header offset when navigating via Table of Contents
Consider adding hover underline styles for internal links across learn articles — currently no hover feedback on text links
